name: Zurich Rock 'n' Roll Madrid 10K
summary: Fast 10K through central Madrid from Paseo de la Castellana through the Chamberí and Malasaña neighborhoods, down Gran Vía, and finishing on Paseo de Recoletos.
heroNote: Good cheering spots on Calle de Joaquín Costa near the start and on Gran Vía close to the finish.
specialNote: The organization divides runners into multiple start corrals based on predicted finish time. The listed start time is for the first corral — your actual start may be later.
